name: Mechanism Elucidation from Probes
description: Elucidate a mechanism by combining experimental probes - the measured rate law, trapped intermediates, kinetic isotope effects, and stereochemical outcome - proposing a mechanism, testing it against all evidence and computation, and iterating.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Unknown mechanism"]
    N2["Measure the rate law"]
    N3["Trap / detect intermediates"]
    N4["Kinetic isotope effect"]
    N5["Stereochemical probe"]
    N6["Propose mechanism"]
    N7{"Consistent with all data?"}
    N8["Gather further evidence"]
    N9["Computational support (DFT)"]
    N10["Validated mechanism"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|no| N8
    N8 -->|more probes| N3
    N7 -->|yes| N9
    N9 --> N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Modern Physical Organic Chemistry — Mechanisms and Probes
sources.authors: Anslyn, E. V.; Dougherty, D. A.

sources.title: The kinetic isotope effect and its use in studying reaction mechanisms

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

nodeDetails.label: Kinetic isotope effect
nodeDetails.detail: Probe bond changes at the TS

flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.
